panel_measure: MDS embedding of whole-arm/centromere contact-frequency matrix
region_definition: Whole CHM13 p-arm, centromere, q-arm intervals from CHM13_chrom_parts.bed; not PHR intervals; not terminal 500 kb; not 1 Mb flanks/windows
sign_or_distance_convention: Contact-space MDS; axes are abstract MDS coordinates; not physical genome reconstruction
recommended_caption: CHM13 Hi-C MDS over whole p-arm, centromere, and q-arm contact regions; contact-space summary, not full physical 3D genome reconstruction.

panel_measure: Whole-genome 2D projection of existing 3DG physical coordinates
region_definition: Genome-wide 3DG particles from one existing reconstructed GM12878 cell
sign_or_distance_convention: Physical-coordinate projection; not CHM13; not Hi-C; not PHR-specific validation
recommended_caption: Optional physical-coordinate context from one GM12878 Dip-C cell; not a replacement for the CHM13 Hi-C contact-space MDS.

panel_measure: Mantel-style arm-level sequence similarity vs 3D proximity
region_definition: Per-arm CHM13 PHR coordinates for 38 C-community arms; terminal 500 kb for 8 arms without CHM13 PHR support; shared-arm Mantel uses 33 arms
sign_or_distance_convention: Proximity = -mean 3D Euclidean distance; higher y means closer; positive rho means more similar sequence is closer
recommended_caption: GM12878 Dip-C: sequence similarity predicts 3D proximity; Mantel rho=0.296, p=0.002, 16 cells.

panel_measure: Per-community normalized radial position and within-vs-between radial-position similarity
region_definition: Same GM12878 Dip-C region set as community 3D enrichment; radial positions normalized by 95th percentile radius
sign_or_distance_convention: Within-vs-between radial difference; smaller difference means more similar radial position
recommended_caption: GM12878 Dip-C radial community structure: same-community arms have more similar radial positions than between-community arms.

panel_measure: Mantel-style arm-level sequence similarity vs 3D proximity
region_definition: Corrected PHR-specific sperm single-cell 3D enrichment; shared-arm Mantel uses 33 arms
sign_or_distance_convention: Proximity = -mean 3D Euclidean distance; higher y means closer; positive rho means more similar sequence is closer
recommended_caption: Sperm single-cell Hi-C / 3DG: sequence similarity predicts 3D proximity; Mantel rho=0.202, p=0.023, 20 cells.

panel_measure: Per-community normalized radial position and within-vs-between radial-position similarity
region_definition: Corrected PHR-specific sperm single-cell 3D enrichment; radial positions normalized by 95th percentile radius
sign_or_distance_convention: Within-vs-between radial difference; smaller difference means more similar radial position
recommended_caption: Sperm radial community structure across 20 haploid sperm cells; same radial statistic as GM12878 in a distinct cell type.

panel_measure: C-community W/B distance ratio vs S_all non-sharing negative control
region_definition: C-community PHR-specific regions and S_all terminal 500 kb non-sharing arms
sign_or_distance_convention: W/B = mean within-community distance / mean between-community distance; W/B < 1 is closer; S_all > 1 is farther
recommended_caption: Negative control: sequence-sharing communities are closer, while non-sharing S_all arms are farther apart.

panel_measure: Community-free per-cell Spearman rho for sequence similarity vs 3D proximity
region_definition: Pangenome-level community-free PHR/single-cell 3D mapping; arm-level summaries are pooled across cells
sign_or_distance_convention: Rho uses sequence similarity vs 3D proximity (-distance); positive rho means more similar sequences are closer
recommended_caption: Community-free per-cell rho: sequence similarity predicts proximity; sperm pooled arm-level result is marked as a caveat.
